AI.rationale: NVDA Q4 FY26 $68B (+73% YoY), Q1 guide $78B; GTC March 16 unveiled Vera Rubin NVL72 with $1T pipeline; GOOGL Cloud +48% to $17.7B with 2026 capex $175-185B; MSFT Azure +38% CC, Cloud past $50B/qtr.

rockets_spacecraft.rationale: RKLB Q4 $180M (+36% YoY), full-year $602M, backlog $1.85B (+73% YoY) — strong but Neutron debut slipped to Q4 2026 from Q1 2026 after Stage 1 tank manufacturing defect (announced Feb 26 earnings call). Pre-profit; medium-lift market still nascent.

robotics.rationale: BOTZ +21.9% TTM, $3.4B AUM with NVDA at 10.61% top holding (AI-correlation note); Chinese humanoid cost compression (Unitree G1 ~$13,500) signals commercially-viable threshold being crossed. Active adoption compounding rather than early buildup.

engineered_biology.rationale: FDA Plausible Mechanism Pathway guidance Feb 23, 2026 lowers approval friction; CRSP/Capsida ALS discovery deal Feb 2026; ARKG AUM only $984M with binary-readout exposure to pre-commercial holdings. Regulatory scaffolding rising, commercial liftoff not begun.

quantum.rationale: QTUM March 20 reconstitution toward pure-play hardware; AUM $3.6B; Grayscale filed competing quantum ETF. GQI 2026 predictions cite hardware milestones (coherence, error correction) as next leg — still pre-revenue. Speculative-capital-led, not revenue-led.

nuclear_fusion.rationale: NUKZ +73% TTM, $875M AUM driven by AI-data-center power-demand re-rating of fission utilities (Constellation, Cameco). FIA FY26 budget advocacy and NRC fusion regulatory framework are policy groundwork, not revenue. Fusion sub-theme entirely pre-commercial.

general_markets.rationale: FOMC held 3.50-3.75% March 18 with dot plot split 7/7 between no-cuts and one-cut for 2026; AGG 30d yield 4.31%, duration 5.78yr; gold record highs ~$5,000 then mid-March dip and rebound; VIG -1.75% Q1, AUM $124.65B.
